name: doctor: the cloud-conventions check is a safe no-op (status skipped, exit 0) on a repo with no cloud IaC, so non-cloud repos are never regressed
command: mkdir -p repo && echo 'console.log(1)' > repo/app.js && printf '{"name":"x"}' > repo/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check cloud-conventions --root repo
